title: poa nutans
intro: Poa nutans, also known as the common meadow-grass or drooping grass, is a perennial grass species native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa nutans include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Poa nutans can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
